## Checklist

- [ ] `xcodebuild test -scheme NavigationKit-Package -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro'` passes
- [ ] `Examples/ShowCaseApp` still builds (if behavior visible from the example app changed)
- [ ] Public API changes have doc comments
- [ ] Relevant guides in `Documentation/` updated, if applicable
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
